name: Monsoon Flood — Odisha
description: Severe flooding across 3 districts. Demonstrates logistics coordination pipeline with resource planning and route replanning.

body.query: Severe monsoon flooding in Odisha has cut off Puri, Cuttack, and Khordha districts. Over 50,000 people displaced. Urgent need for rice, drinking water, medical supplies, and tarpaulin. NH-16 partially submerged near Bhubaneswar.

expected_behavior.reason: NH-16 flood damage triggers alternative route via airport/port
